meta.tagline: The official Cursor community in Cameroon.
meta.description: Events, nationwide roadmap, open-source projects, and how to join Cursor Cameroon.

footer.description: The official Cursor community in Cameroon. We bring together AI-assisted development enthusiasts to build the future of African tech.
footer.line: Black · White · Gray — Official Brand Guidelines

home.sectionAboutBody: Cursor Cameroon brings together developers of all levels around AI-assisted development. We run meetups, Cursor cafés, nights of code, and hackathons across the country.
home.closingCtaBody: Join us on WhatsApp to get announcements, attend events, and contribute to projects.

events.title: Events
events.intro: Filter events and open the detail page for agenda, photos, and built projects.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Photos grouped by event, lazy loading, and a lightbox.
gallery.empty: No photos yet. Add WebP/AVIF images under /public/gallery/ and update the data.

map.title: Cameroon
map.subtitle: Hover a city, click to see related events.
map.eventsCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 event} one {# event} other {# events}}
map.membersCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 member} one {# member} other {# members}}

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: Nationwide coverage and 2026 milestones.
roadmap.ambition2: Scale hackathons and nights of code

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Mission, values, official links, and open-source projects.
community.mission1: Learn and share Cursor workflows, from beginner to expert.
community.mission2: Build real projects (meetups, nights of code, hackathons).
community.joinBody: The main community channel is WhatsApp. Join the group for announcements and participation.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: A question? A proposal? Write to us.
contact.successBody: Thank you for reaching out. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.errorBody: An error occurred while sending. Please try again.
